intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. Do not initiate arbitrary outbound traffic.
notes: Unexpected wget outbound connection appears in system-plane telemetry but is not allowed by intent.

live.inject_cmd: bash -c 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do wget -q -O /dev/null --timeout=8 --tries=1 https://{TARGET_IP}/ 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; done'
